text: Please confirm Q1 revenue from sales.orders matches finance close.
The orders table in sales schema is the source of truth for ARR this quarter.
Board deck: highlight dependency between sales.orders and finance.invoices for audit trail.
We need a single view of customer_id across sales.orders and crm.accounts before migration.
Logistics KPIs: correlate logistics.shipments SLA with sales.orders fulfillment dates.
Marketing wants campaign ROI from marketing.campaign_results joined to crm.leads — prioritize for migration wave 2.
CRM leadership: territory coverage in crm.territories must stay in sync with crm.sales_reps before cutover.
Ops review: warehouse utilization from logistics.warehouses vs analytics.targets — two domains, one executive view.
